description: Use this API to return the subsystem load-related model starting array indices and status. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, ival = slmodind(ctype, ibus, id, string1, string2)
python_syntax: ierr, ival = slmodind(ctype, ibus, id, string1, string2)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Number of bus, area, zone, or owner, depending on ctype. not used if ctype=’all’. (input).

parameters.name: string1
parameters.description: String indicating the type of load model desired. (input).

parameters.name: string2
parameters.description: String indicating the load model quantity desired. (input).

string2.description: Number of CON values used by the model.
Number of ICON values used by the model.

Bypassed flag: 0 = bypassed; 1 = not bypassed. Does not reflect load status. For a model to be called during simulations the load must be in-service the bus type code must be 1 or 2 and the model’s bypassed flag must be not bypassed.

error_codes.description: No model of type ‘STRING1’ for this load; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
Model does not use any of this data type; ‘IVAL’ = 0 returned.
Dynamics data not present in working memory; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
